articles.title: PSI Automation - Company Profile and Products | Metoree
articles.description: PSI Automation, LLC, established in 2016 as Pneumatic Systems, Inc., is an American manufacturer based in Sandpoint, Idaho, specializing in air motors. Air motors operate by expanding compressed air to perform mechanical work.

articles.title: About Us – PSI Automation
articles.description: For more than 30 years, we at PSI Automation (formerly Baccara Australia and Baccara Automation Control) have been supplying the highest quality valves and equipment to Industry throughout Australia, New Zealand, and the Oceanic Region through our comprehensive network of distributors and resellers. We have extensive knowledge of a huge range of products including: ... Over 45 years’ experience in the pneumatics industry including IMI Norgren, Honeywell, Melbourne Air & Hydraulics, Rexroth and owner of PSI Fluid Power.
